data.title: Trump announced that he would release a "reciprocal tariff" move today, but did not disclose the details
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News U.S. President Trump said he would announce reciprocal tariff measures on Thursday, promising to make good on his threat to impose tariffs on imports from countries that impose higher tariffs on U.S. goods. The move would represent a major escalation in his trade war with economic partners. Trump announced the move on his Truth Social platform. He did not elaborate on what the tariffs would be, how the tariffs would be structured, or when the tariffs would take effect. White House Press Secretary Levitt previously said Trump planned to announce the tariff plan before his meeting with Indian Prime Minister Modi on Thursday. While Trump did not provide a specific time when he planned to announce the plan, the White House said he planned to sign the executive order at 1 p.m. before the Indian leader arrived at the White House. (Jinshi)

data.title: BingX Labs provides $10 million in funding to StakeStone, a full-chain liquidity infrastructure
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BingX Labs, the innovation department of the crypto exchange BingX, has provided $10 million in support to the full-chain liquidity infrastructure StakeStone to accelerate the development of full-chain liquidity staking and StakingFi applications. As part of this cooperation, the $10 million fund will support the development of the Stakestone ecosystem, and the two parties will explore innovative growth directions, including cross-chain asset protocols and StakingFi product integration, while expanding the practical application of full-chain staking technology. In addition, the funds will also be used to promote on-chain inclusive finance, make blockchain financial services more popular, and lower the entry threshold for users. (Chainwire)

data.title: Mastercard acknowledges that stablecoins have the potential to disrupt traditional finance and tokenized 30% of its transactions last year
data.description: Payment giant Mastercard has tokenized 30% of its transactions by 2024 and acknowledged that stablecoins have the potential to disrupt traditional finance. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Tether CEO Criticizes JPMorgan Analysts Over Bitcoin Remarks
data.description: According to Odaily, Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino commented on social media platform X, suggesting that JPMorgan analysts' dissatisfaction stems from not holding Bitcoin. Previously, JPMorgan analysts indicated that Tether might need to sell certain non-compliant assets, such as Bitcoin, precious metals, commercial paper, and secured loans, to adhere to proposed U.S. stablecoin regulations.

data.title: Former US SEC cryptocurrency advisor: Trump is involved in a cryptocurrency scheme that harms investors
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Earlier this year, the cryptocurrency $Trump launched by Trump sparked a speculative frenzy in a short period of time, but what worries government regulators is that while the Trump family is making profits, Trump is quickly pushing to end the regulatory crackdown on cryptocurrencies by multiple government agencies. Corey Frayer, a former cryptocurrency consultant to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), said: "President Trump is participating in cryptocurrency schemes that harm investors while appointing financial regulators that will weaken victim protections, which may protect him and his family from law enforcement actions." The launch of the $Trump meme coin is the first time that the Trump family has directly promoted new cryptocurrency tokens to ordinary investors. These products that received large purchases in the early stage and were quickly sold off have aroused the vigilance of New York regulators, which called these operations "pump-and-dump" plans and warned that they could cause investors who bought in later to suffer huge losses. There is no evidence that Trump or his affiliates artificially pushed up the price of $Trump or engaged in insider trading. (New York Times)

data.title: Trump: Big news today about implementing reciprocal tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that there is big news about (implementation of) reciprocal tariffs today. (Jinshi)

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: Mode Network has frozen most of Ionic’s stolen assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: SlowMist Yuxian posted on the X platform that the Mode network has frozen most of the assets stolen from Ionic, and those that have not been intercepted have been laundered by Tornado Cash. In comparison, if Starknet helps zkLend, the situation may be better. In fact, it strongly supports blockchain review of large thefts occurring on its own network.

data.title: Coinbase International: IP-PERP pre-release market will soon be converted to a standard perpetual futures market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase International Station posted on the X platform that it will start converting the IP-PERP pre-release market to the standard perpetual futures market at around 23:00 Beijing time (15:00 UTC time). The conversion process is expected to take 4 hours.

data.title: Analysis: A Fed audit could boost Bitcoin and shake confidence in the dollar
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Calls for an audit of the Federal Reserve are rising again, with social media increasingly supporting Ron Paul to lead the effort, while also receiving high-profile support from Elon Musk. The Fed has long maintained a high degree of independence to avoid political influence on monetary policy. However, Washington has previously strongly resisted proposals for a Fed audit. Some experts believe that increased scrutiny of the Fed could undermine market confidence in the dollar and accelerate the transfer of funds to alternative assets such as Bitcoin and gold. (The Block)

data.title: Gate.io recently launched a variety of diversified BTC financial products to support BTC compound interest investment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io has recently launched a variety of diversified BTC financial products. Users can make BTC compound interest investments through various investment portfolio strategies such as Yubibao, Launchpool, quantitative financial management, and Shark Fin. The estimated annualized return can reach up to 8.02%.
